ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year the company went public */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "summary_quote" TEXT /* URL to the summary quote on a financial website */,
  "ceo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the company's official website */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_ceo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ceo_id") REFERENCES management_team ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data is reported for */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue in millions */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income in millions */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividends_per_share" REAL /* Dividends per share */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin as a percentage */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin as a percentage */,
  "net_margin" REAL /* Net margin as a percentage */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity as a percentage */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets as a percentage */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management team member */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the team member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the team member */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the team member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the team member started their position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the team member ended their position (if applicable) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_management_team_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "press_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each press release */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the press release is from */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the press release */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the press release */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the press release was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the press release */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the press release */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for media inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_press_releases_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "close_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded at the closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preferences belong to */,
  "watchlist" TEXT /* List of companies in the user's watchlist */,
  "alert_preferences" TEXT /* User's alert preferences (e.g., stock price alerts) */,
  "theme" TEXT /* User's preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* User's preferred time zone */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the watchlist belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the watchlist entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price_change, news) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company relationship */,
  "company_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first company in the relationship */,
  "company_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second company in the relationship */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., competitor, partner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_relations_company_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_1") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_relations_company_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_2") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the news article */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who rated the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial statement belongs to */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue in millions */,
  "cost_of_goods_sold" REAL /* Cost of goods sold in millions */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit in millions */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses in millions */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income in millions */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income in millions */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividends_per_share" REAL /* Dividends per share */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets in millions */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities in millions */,
  "total_equity" REAL /* Total equity in millions */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow in millions */,
  "free_cash_flow" REAL /* Free cash flow in millions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
